purpose: Useful new NPC portrait production manifest. Do not generate the full set until legacy character prompts are also complete and the final manifest is approved.

layout.backgroundRule: one continuous flat green background; no visible cell panels, grid lines, borders, gradients, or separators
layout.visibleSpacingRule: portraits should be scaled down inside each crop cell so there is clear green space between adjacent characters

cropNamingRules: Crop by row/column/cropCell from this JSON, not by visual guessing.
Name each cropped file exactly as outputFile.
If the generated sheet resolution differs, scale crop coordinates proportionally from the actual width/height while preserving 3 columns by 4 rows.
If a portrait touches a crop-cell edge or crosses a cell boundary, reject the sheet instead of naming by guess.
sheetPrompt: Create one full medieval fantasy character portrait sprite sheet using this JSON only. Use the exact layout, order, crop cells, imageIds, and outputFiles from the JSON. Use one continuous flat pure green #00FF00 background with no visible grid, no borders, no colored panels, and no separators. Keep every portrait fully inside its invisible crop cell and slightly smaller than the cell for safe cropping. Characters should be beautiful, entertaining, slightly cartoony, profession-specific, and varied, including fantasy ancestries and magical traits when specified.
sharedStyle: stylized medieval fantasy merchant RPG portrait art, polished painterly-cartoon PC game UI look, slightly cartoony, beautiful, charming, expressive, entertaining, natural facial acting, clear profession silhouette, varied body shapes, rich costume accents, crop-safe bust portrait, one flat solid pure green #00FF00 background

images.identityAnchor: same person as npc-new-004: thin young collector, warm golden-brown skin, crescent earrings, midnight-blue scarf, many silver rings, wide restless eyes, nervous elegant hands, velvet specimen pouch
images.prompt: A thin young rare item collector with warm golden-brown skin, crescent earrings, midnight-blue scarf, silver rings on every finger, wide restless eyes, elegant nervous hands around a velvet specimen pouch and tiny rumor catalog. ultra-readable stylized medieval fantasy merchant game portrait, polished painterly-cartoon PC RPG UI art, three-quarter bust portrait, clear face, expressive eyes, collectible NPC portrait, clean silhouette, soft warm daylight, simple pure green background #00FF00 for cropping, generous padding around head and shoulders. Expression: happy expression, genuine smile or profession-appropriate satisfaction, brighter eyes, identity anchors unchanged. Ancestry/species: moon-touched half-elf. Visible magical traits that must remain consistent: faint moon marks, small lunar shimmer around jewelry. Identity anchors must remain unchanged: same person as npc-new-004: thin young collector, warm golden-brown skin, crescent earrings, midnight-blue scarf, many silver rings, wide restless eyes, nervous elegant hands, velvet specimen pouch. stylized medieval fantasy merchant RPG portrait art, polished painterly-cartoon PC game UI look, slightly cartoony, beautiful, charming, expressive, entertaining, natural facial acting, clear profession silhouette, varied body shapes, rich costume accents, crop-safe bust portrait, one flat solid pure green #00FF00 background. Keep the complete bust and every prop fully inside the assigned invisible crop cell. Keep the character slightly smaller than the crop cell with clear green padding on all sides. Use one continuous flat #00FF00 background only; do not draw cell panels, separators, frames, borders, gradients, or grid lines.
images.negativePrompt: no text, no labels, no watermark, no UI frame, no border, no duplicated face, no extra limbs, no photorealism, no modern clothes, no sci-fi, no generic identical medieval NPC face, no cropped head, no busy background
